standardsBaseline: Frontend Coding Standards (attached) + AGENTS.md + Velarro security/visibility skills

findings.title: AgeStateProvider wrote non-httpOnly document.cookie conflicting with server httpOnly cookie
findings.standardViolated: Security Rules; Velarro age-cookie httpOnly policy
findings.evidence: setAgeState previously assigned document.cookie via serializeAgeStateCookie while getAgeStateCookieOptions sets httpOnly:true on the server path in lib/age/age-actions.ts. Provider was unused in the live tree but remained a footgun.
findings.rootCause: Dual write strategies for the same cookie name without mounting discipline.
findings.userOrBusinessImpact: If wired later, client could create a JS-readable age cookie or fail to align with httpOnly server cookie, weakening age-state integrity.
findings.exploitability: Low today (provider unused); high if mounted without change.
findings.recommendedRemediation: Persist only via confirmAgeStateAction; keep client provider React-state-only.
findings.validationStatus: code changed; re-run of npm test BLOCKED by before-shell hook after edit
findings.residualRisk: Provider still unused — mount only with server-initialized props if needed.

findings.title: Partner submitted state claims email delivery and application ID without backend
findings.standardViolated: Error/success honesty; regulated-commerce trust; coding standards §10
findings.evidence: PARTNER_SUBMITTED_COPY includes 'Application submitted', fake 'Application ID #VL-10482', and 'A confirmation has been sent to your registered email.' while partner-form.tsx preventDefault with no network. Documented in docs/implementation/modules/M09-partner/implementation-notes.md as Figma-locked known limitation. Get-in-touch and careers use honest UI-only copy.
findings.rootCause: Visual fidelity to Figma confirmation frame prioritized over truthful runtime messaging.
findings.userOrBusinessImpact: Users may believe partnership applications were filed and emailed; regulated brand trust risk.
findings.recommendedRemediation: Replace with honest preview copy (mirror get-in-touch) once product approves deviation from Figma node 15640:24481, or connect a real backend.
findings.fixReference: Added data-submission-status=ui-only-not-connected markers only; copy unchanged pending approval
findings.validationStatus: documented; visual copy not changed (AGENTS.md / Figma lock)
findings.residualRisk: Visible false confirmation remains in review build.

findings.title: No Prettier / format script despite coding standards §9
findings.evidence: Scripts expose lint/test/build/e2e only. Glob found zero prettier configs. Standards require npm run format.
findings.userOrBusinessImpact: Inconsistent formatting across PRs; checklist item fails.
findings.recommendedRemediation: Add pinned prettier + format/format:check scripts and CI check.
findings.residualRisk: ESLint alone does not enforce style formatting.

findings.title: JSON-LD schema builders exist but are not rendered on any page
findings.evidence: schema.ts exports Organization/WebSite/Product builders with placeholder guards; grep found zero application/ld+json or dangerouslySetInnerHTML usage in app/components. tests/seo/schema.test.ts covers builders only.
findings.rootCause: SEO helpers prepared ahead of page wiring; only / is indexable.
findings.userOrBusinessImpact: Limited rich-result readiness for home/organization once indexing expands.
findings.recommendedRemediation: Wire trusted JSON-LD on approved indexable pages only when content is visible and approved.

findings.title: Missing app/not-found.tsx, error.tsx, loading.tsx
findings.evidence: Glob and architecture audit found no not-found/error/loading special files. Build still emits default /_not-found. Unimplemented manifest routes fall through to default 404.
findings.userOrBusinessImpact: Generic Next 404 UX; weaker brand continuity and a11y messaging.
findings.recommendedRemediation: Add branded not-found/error after START VELARRO IMPLEMENTATION with approved copy.
findings.validationStatus: open — blocked by AGENTS.md production UI gate

findings.title: CI does not execute Playwright tests — only --list
findings.evidence: Step 'List E2E tests' runs npm run test:e2e -- --list. Full browser flows (11 tests) are not CI-gated.
findings.userOrBusinessImpact: Visual/security-header e2e regressions can merge undetected.
findings.recommendedRemediation: Run chromium e2e on PRs once flakiness budget is acceptable.
findings.residualRisk: Unit suite remains strong (360 tests verified).

findings.title: Transitive PostCSS moderate XSS advisory via Next bundled dependency
findings.evidence: npm audit reports postcss <8.5.10 (GHSA-qx2v-qp2m-jg93) under node_modules/next/node_modules/postcss; next@16.2.10 flagged. npm audit fix --force proposes next@9.3.3 (unsafe).
findings.userOrBusinessImpact: Theoretical XSS via CSS stringify; low practical exposure for this static marketing app.
findings.exploitability: Low without attacker-controlled CSS stringify path
findings.recommendedRemediation: Wait for Next patch ≥ fixed postcss; do not force-downgrade.
findings.validationStatus: accepted residual — do not force audit fix
findings.residualRisk: Moderate advisory until Next upgrades nested postcss.

findings.title: Production CSP allows script-src 'unsafe-inline'
findings.evidence: Production script-src is ['self','unsafe-inline']; unsafe-eval only in development (tested).
findings.rootCause: Next.js inline bootstrap / no nonce pipeline yet.
findings.userOrBusinessImpact: Raises XSS impact if injection ever appears.
findings.recommendedRemediation: Introduce nonce/hash CSP when Next app supports it without breakage.
findings.residualRisk: No dangerouslySetInnerHTML currently; surface remains tight.

findings.title: Age gate references Terms & Privacy routes that are unimplemented
findings.evidence: Copy states user agrees to Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy; route-manifest marks /terms-of-service and /privacy-policy implemented:false; age-gate has no links to those routes.
findings.rootCause: Legal pages not shipped; gate copy anticipates them.
findings.userOrBusinessImpact: Users cannot review policies before confirming age.
findings.recommendedRemediation: Ship legal pages or soften copy until policies exist.

findings.title: Folder structure diverges from coding-standards tutorial tree
findings.evidence: No src/, services/, hooks/, store/, types/, constants/. Uses app/, components/{ui,layout,m0x}, lib/, tests/. Coherent for current stage.
findings.rootCause: Module-driven Velarro architecture vs generic tutorial layout.
findings.userOrBusinessImpact: Standards checklist 'fail' if judged literally; maintainability remains good.
findings.recommendedRemediation: Adopt services/ when APIs exist; do not mass-reorganize now.

findings.title: Stale create-next-app README claimed Geist and generic Getting Started
findings.evidence: Prior README referenced Geist and create-next-app boilerplate while layout uses Noto Sans + Gotham fallback tokens.

findings.title: robots.test.ts TypeScript narrowing failure under tsc --noEmit
findings.evidence: npx tsc --noEmit reported Property 'disallow' does not exist on union including rules arrays. next build typecheck excludes or does not fail the same way.
findings.userOrBusinessImpact: Standalone typecheck fails; CI relies on next build.
findings.validationStatus: code fixed; tsc re-run BLOCKED by shell hook
findings.residualRisk: Confirm with tsc when hooks restored.

findings.title: Hardcoded hex/rgba and inline styles bypass token boundary in places
findings.standardViolated: Styling Standards; project tokens boundary rule
findings.evidence: Partner success icon uses border-[#465739] bg-[#e6ebdd]. Multiple heroes use style={{}} for crop math. ~10 inline style sites counted.
findings.userOrBusinessImpact: Token drift risk; some inline styles justified for crop math.
findings.recommendedRemediation: Map static colors to tokens; keep documented crop inline styles.
findings.residualRisk: Visual review builds may intentionally keep Figma hexes.

findings.title: No prefers-reduced-motion handling for carousels/motion
findings.evidence: Repo-wide grep found no prefers-reduced-motion usage in components. Carousel is client-interactive.
findings.userOrBusinessImpact: Users preferring reduced motion may still get animated carousels.

findings.title: Age gating is RSC/cookie UX control, not middleware-enforced authorization
findings.evidence: No middleware.ts/proxy.ts. getRouteAccess is pure helper used by tests; pages branch UI. Cookie values are non-PII over21/under21.
findings.userOrBusinessImpact: Must not be marketed as complete legal compliance control for commerce.
findings.exploitability: Client can clear cookies / call routes directly; content is public HTML once served.
findings.recommendedRemediation: Add edge enforcement and server authorization when commerce ships.

findings.title: No observability / client error telemetry
findings.evidence: Dependencies are next/react only. No Sentry/LogRocket/analytics packages; CSP connect-src production is 'self' only.
findings.recommendedRemediation: Add approved telemetry with CSP allowlist updates + tests.

findings.title: public/ still contains create-next-app SVG leftovers
findings.evidence: Tracked public SVGs (vercel.svg, next.svg, etc.) unused by Velarro modules; product images are remote Supabase URLs.
findings.recommendedRemediation: Remove unused public scaffold assets in a cleanup PR.

findings.title: allowJs enabled with strict TypeScript project
findings.evidence: allowJs: true; codebase is effectively TS-only for handwritten source.
findings.userOrBusinessImpact: Low — no JS app source found.
